'''yomapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubegoldbergian|rubegoldbergian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubegoldbergian|rubegoldbergian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yomapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomapithi|yomapithi]] || [[word:yomapiji|yomapiji]] || [[word:yomapishi|yomapishi]] || [[word:yomapiki|yomapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomaputhuthu|yomaputhuthu]] || [[word:yomapujuju|yomapujuju]] || [[word:yomapushushu|yomapushushu]] || [[word:yomapukuku|yomapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomaputhu|yomaputhu]] || [[word:yomapuju|yomapuju]] || [[word:yomapushu|yomapushu]] || [[word:yomapuku|yomapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomapufthuf|yomapufthuf]] || [[word:yomapufjuf|yomapufjuf]] || [[word:yomapufshuf|yomapufshuf]] || [[word:yomapufkuf|yomapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomapethe|yomapethe]] || [[word:yomapeje|yomapeje]] || [[word:yomapeshe|yomapeshe]] || [[word:yomapeke|yomapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomapothotho|yomapothotho]] || [[word:yomapojojo|yomapojojo]] || [[word:yomaposhosho|yomaposhosho]] || [[word:yomapokoko|yomapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomapotho|yomapotho]] || [[word:yomapojo|yomapojo]] || [[word:yomaposho|yomaposho]] || [[word:yomapoko|yomapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomapofthof|yomapofthof]] || [[word:yomapofjof|yomapofjof]] || [[word:yomapofshof|yomapofshof]] || [[word:yomapofkof|yomapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfthÃŸf|yomapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfjÃŸf|yomapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfshÃŸf|yomapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfkÃŸf|yomapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yomapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yomapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yomapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yomapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfthÃŸf|yomapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfjÃŸf|yomapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfshÃŸf|yomapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfkÃŸf|yomapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfthÃŸf|yomapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfjÃŸf|yomapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfshÃŸf|yomapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yomapÃŸfkÃŸf|yomapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomapÃḊthÃḊ|yomapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yomapÃḊjÃḊ|yomapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yomapÃḊshÃḊ|yomapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yomapÃḊkÃḊ|yomapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomapathatha|yomapathatha]] || [[word:yomapajaja|yomapajaja]] || [[word:yomapashasha|yomapashasha]] || [[word:yomapakaka|yomapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomapatha|yomapatha]] || [[word:yomapaja|yomapaja]] || [[word:yomapasha|yomapasha]] || [[word:yomapaka|yomapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomapafthaf|yomapafthaf]] || [[word:yomapafjaf|yomapafjaf]] || [[word:yomapafshaf|yomapafshaf]] || [[word:yomapafkaf|yomapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yomapasha|yomapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomapshÃḋsha|yomapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomaprosha|yomaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomapmusha|yomapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomapyasha|yomapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomapnkshÃḋsha|goyomapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomapnkrosha|goyomapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomapnkmusha|goyomapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomapnkyasha|goyomapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yomamapasha|yomamapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomamapshÃḋsha|yomamapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomamaprosha|yomamaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomamapmusha|yomamapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomamapyasha|yomamapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomamapnkshÃḋsha|goyomamapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomamapnkrosha|goyomamapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomamapnkmusha|goyomamapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomamapnkyasha|goyomamapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yemÃḊpasha|yemÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yemÃḊpshÃḋsha|yemÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yemÃḊprosha|yemÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yemÃḊpmusha|yemÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yemÃḊpyasha|yemÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyemÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|goyemÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyemÃḊpnkrosha|goyemÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyemÃḊpnkmusha|goyemÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyemÃḊpnkyasha|goyemÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yomfapasha|yomfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomfapshÃḋsha|yomfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomfaprosha|yomfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomfapmusha|yomfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomfapyasha|yomfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomfapnkshÃḋsha|goyomfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomfapnkrosha|goyomfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomfapnkmusha|goyomfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomfapnkyasha|goyomfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
